buildCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @cbt/shared build && pnpm --filter @cbt/web build
installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
